title: Classic American Ham and Cheese Bake
description: A simple and satisfying casserole made with ham, cheese, and a hint of indulgence.
instructions: In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
Add the sliced ham and cook until lightly browned.
In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, egg, salt, and black pepper.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange half of the cooked ham.
Sprinkle shredded cheese over the ham, followed by the breadcrumb mixture.
Pour the milk mixture over the top and sprinkle with remaining cheese.
Arrange the remaining ham slices on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and the casserole is set.
Let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
